reply_engine._comment: agent_mode: 'standard' (default) or 'tool_agent' (opt-in experimental deep-agent tool loop)
reply_engine._comment_wechat_mcp:
enable_wechat_mcp_tool only adds a prompt hint. Actual execution of WeChat message/contact query tools is handled by Hermes's native MCP layer and requires registering the WeChat MCP server in Hermes config.yaml (do NOT modify the user's actual Hermes config; this is documentation only):

mcp_servers:
  wechat:
    command: python
    args: ["mcp_server.py"]
    cwd: "E:/projects/GA-projects/CD-only/wechat-decrypt"
